an4.3:1.1:
1
"Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bālo abyatto asappuriso khataṁ upahataṁ attānaṁ pariharati, sāvajjo ca hoti sānuvajjo ca viññūnaṁ, bahuñca apuññaṁ pasavati. Katamehi catūhi.
an4.3:1.4: ananuvicca apariyogāhetvā appasādanīye ṭhāne pasādaṁ upadaṁseti.
an4.3:1.5: ananuvicca apariyogāhetvā pasādanīye ṭhāne appasādaṁ upadaṁseti –
an4.3:1.6: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato bālo abyatto asappuriso khataṁ upahataṁ attānaṁ pariharati, sāvajjo ca hoti sānuvajjo ca viññūnaṁ, bahuñca apuññaṁ pasavati.
an4.3:1.7:
2
Catūhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato paṇḍito viyatto sappuriso akkhataṁ anupahataṁ attānaṁ pariharati, anavajjo ca hoti ananuvajjo ca viññūnaṁ, bahuñca puññaṁ pasavati. Katamehi catūhi.
an4.3:1.10: anuvicca pariyogāhetvā appasādanīye ṭhāne appasādaṁ upadaṁseti.
an4.3:1.11: anuvicca pariyogāhetvā pasādanīye ṭhāne pasādaṁ upadaṁseti –
an4.3:1.12: imehi kho, bhikkhave, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato paṇḍito viyatto sappuriso akkhataṁ anupahataṁ attānaṁ pariharati, anavajjo ca hoti ananuvajjo ca viññūnaṁ, bahuñca puññaṁ pasavatīti.
an4.3:1.13:
3
Yo nindiyaṁ pasaṁsati,
Taṁ vā nindati yo pasaṁsiyo;
Vicināti mukhena so kaliṁ,
Kalinā tena sukhaṁ na vindati.
an4.3:1.15:
5
Sataṁ sahassānaṁ nirabbudānaṁ,
Chattiṁsatī pañca ca abbudāni;
Yamariyagarahī nirayaṁ upeti,
Vācaṁ manañca paṇidhāya pāpakan"ti.
Tatiyaṁ.
